summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No security-sensitive signal was present, and no shared canonical was invented. Close, merge, fix, raise_pr, instant-close, and low-signal closeout are unavailable for this job, so open PRs with maintainer-review, author-proof, or technical-correctness gates are left open with scoped non-mutating actions or exact needs_human entries.

actions.reason: This appears to be a focused, proof-backed session-state fix, but the hydrated bot review explicitly leaves the final technical/maintainer review decision unresolved and this job cannot merge or repair it.

This is a proof-backed focused Codex extension repair, but the hydrated review leaves final maintainer/technical acceptance open and this job cannot merge or modify the branch.

This broad feature PR has failing real behavior proof and unresolved actionable bot review comments. It needs maintainer/product judgment and author changes rather than backlog closeout or autonomous repair.
